Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I know that you'll do what's best for everyone, so I'm with you all the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}This may sound strange, given the circumstances, but... I'm so glad you're all safe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 64 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I want him back! I don't care about anything else! I just want him to come back![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 64 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I tried... so hard to be strong, and to look forward, and just accept it all, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I told him I'd do my best to change this world, so people would stop wishing for the Fall...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}That's why I wanted to move on from the past and just focus on the future...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 64 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}That was just a promise to myself, not to him... So it... It can't end like that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}It's hard... Unbearably hard. But if you don't face that pain, it will never heal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}So, what, if I face it, it'll suddenly be okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'll just accept that he's gone, or forget all about it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}All of us should know by now... That never happens![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}You face your pain because it'll never truly go away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Yukari... Would you help me fulfill the promise I made to him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}It was more a promise to myself, like yours.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}He... taught me so much. And showed me so many things that I've come to treasure.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}But before I could thank him... He was gone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}The regret was... suffocating. So, I promised myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I would always be there for the ones I care about, and fight to protect them, no matter the cost.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}And you're someone I care about, Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}You may not have thought much of it, but to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Last year, when you refused to give up on me and gave me something to fight for again... I will never forget that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}So this time, I... We... want to be here for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}The pain of losing someone close to you is terrible... But you don't have to hold it in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}And, Yukari... You've kept yours locked up for too long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}You've been trying so hard to push forward... that you never stopped to grieve.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}It's all right. We're here for you. Your friends are here for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Yukari-san... I want him to come back too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}But... I stopped to think about everything, like you told us to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}And I realized something... So please, I'd like you to listen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}I want to know what exactly he did... in that moment he used his power.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}We still aren't entirely sure what really happened to him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I think we should know that before making a choice... So I won't use the key just yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}This is the answer I arrived at... after learning everyone else's feelings.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}I agree. We should know the whole story before acting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}I'm not sure... All the doors to the past are gone, except the one to his room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}There's actually one more, remember? We've been using it this whole time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}That's right... The door to Paulownia Mall![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}"The doors reflect the minds of those who pass through"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}If we wish strongly enough to look into the past, that door should allow us to do so.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}I see... It would certainly be worth a try.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}I was just thinking... I don't really have a reason to be here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}And I... I did some horrible things to you all, so... I shouldn't go with you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}Dude, what're you even talkin' about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}We got ourselves into this mess! None of this is on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}Yeah, it's our own fault we got trapped here, and for squabbling with each other too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}You're sticking with us, whether you like it or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}Don't you remember? I told you I won't leave you behind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}Now that I think about it, it's pretty lucky there's still that one door left, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}It almost seems too good to be a coincidence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 78 0 0}If its purpose was to prepare everyone for battle, why is it still here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 79 0 0}We have the true key, so the fighting should be over. But the door hasn't disappeared...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 80 0 0}So then... Does it have another purpose...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}I suppose it would make sense...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 82 0 0}If that door hasn't fulfilled its purpose of preparing us for combat...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 83 0 0}Perhaps there's still an enemy for us to defeat...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 84 0 0}Our own feelings were the cause of this situation...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 85 0 0}And Aigis's proposal would take us to the source of that pain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 86 0 0}I wouldn't be surprised to find something waiting for us there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 88 0 0}So... What should we do? Come up with another plan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 89 0 0}If there is something there... that's even more reason for us to go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 91 0 0}Then this should be our final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 92 0 0}Ha, that sounds familiar... Feels like January again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 93 0 0}I wonder what is waiting for us... Another large Shadow, maybe?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 94 0 0}No point thinking about it. We just gotta beat it, no matter what it is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 96 0 0}That's right! And I'll support you all as best as I can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 98 0 0}When we work together, there's nothing we can't do. Now, let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's only one door left...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The door leading to Paulownia[n]Mall... We should get on our way.[n]{f 1 1}
